name: 11L_RotaryFix_LegalTTT_ParallelMuon_BIGRAM3072
description: Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon, 11L GPT, BigramHash-3072, Partial RoPE (16/64), LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, GQA 8H/4KV, VE128, XSA(last-4), Legal Score-First TTT. Key fix: Rotary NTK-Scaling bug corrected (train_seq_len=2048 propagated correctly to base_model and eval_model). Late QAT threshold 0.57 for ~1700 QAT steps.
